name: Soul Rituals
tagline: Clean-skincare facials and energy healing in Sebastopol
seoDescription: Soul Rituals in Sebastopol, CA pairs medical-grade HydraFacial MD and organic herbal facials with reiki, sound baths, and a crystal apothecary. Founded by esthetician Tiffany Heiden. 5.0★ on Google.

sections.heading: Skincare that nourishes the body and the spirit
sections.subheading: Soul Rituals pairs medical-grade and organic facials with reiki, sound baths, and a crystal apothecary — clean, intentional care from esthetician Tiffany Heiden.
badges: Clean, organic Neptune & The Moon skincare

sections.heading: A facial that feels like a whole-body reset
sections.body: This isn't a clinical treatment room. Every ritual blends real esthetics — HydraFacial MD, lymphatic and gua sha massage, organic herbal skincare — with the calm of crystals, sound, and intention. Clients leave with brighter skin and a quieter mind.
points: Organic, herbal-infused Neptune & The Moon products
Reiki, sound baths, and crystal healing woven in
Tucked into a little yellow house in downtown Sebastopol

sections.heading: Facials, bodywork, and healing
sections.intro: Every service is tailored to you — your skin, your nervous system, what you walked in carrying. A few of the rituals clients return for:

items.title: HydraFacial MD
items.description: Medical-grade, non-invasive skin resurfacing that cleanses, extracts, and hydrates in one session — with a side of crystals and healing energy.

items.title: Signature Facials
items.description: Custom organic facials — including the Crystal Healer and Emerald Dream — built around your skin using the herbal Neptune & The Moon line.

items.title: The Priestess Package
items.description: Our signature pairing of a deep-treatment facial and HydraFacial MD for a complete, otherworldly skin reset.

items.title: Healing Bodywork
items.description: Lymphatic drainage, gua sha, and cupping massage to release tension, calm the body, and restore flow.

items.title: Reiki & Sound Baths
items.description: Energy healing and immersive sound sessions to settle the nervous system and clear what no longer serves you.

items.title: Circles & Readings
items.description: Women's and Sister Circles, tarot and oracle readings, and intuitive sessions for connection and clarity.

sections.heading: Skincare, straight from the heart
body: Soul Rituals began as the vision of esthetician and founder Tiffany Heiden — a place where real skincare and genuine healing live under one roof. From a little yellow portal of a house on South Main Street, it has grown into one of Sebastopol's most-loved wellness destinations.

The philosophy is simple: center on your inner magic and empower you to feel centered and valued. That means clean, organic products, medical-grade results, and treatments held with intention — crystals, sound, and energy woven through every ritual, never as decoration but as part of the work.
highlights: Clean, organic Neptune & The Moon skincare
Healing energy and crystals in every ritual

items.quote: Tiffany's facials are otherworldly — so intentional, so deeply nourishing, it felt like a whole-body reset.
items.author: Google review

items.quote: I enjoyed the HydraFacial and honestly think about it every day when I wash my face.
items.author: Google review

items.quote: Walking into Soul Rituals feels like stepping into pure rainbow-soaked magic.
items.author: Google review

sections.heading: Ready for your ritual?
sections.body: Find us at 496 S Main St in downtown Sebastopol, open Tuesday through Saturday. Call (707) 508-6307 to book your facial or healing session.

sections.heading: Every service, tailored to you
sections.subheading: Real esthetics and genuine healing under one roof — facials, bodywork, energy work, and a crystal apothecary.

sections.heading: Facials & skin
sections.intro: Clean, organic products meet medical-grade results. Each facial is built around your skin, not a script.

items.title: HydraFacial MD
items.description: Medical-grade, non-invasive resurfacing that cleanses, exfoliates, extracts, and deeply hydrates in a single relaxing session — held with crystals and healing energy.

items.title: Crystal Healer Facial
items.description: A signature organic facial that layers herbal Neptune & The Moon skincare with crystal energy work for radiance inside and out.

items.title: Emerald Dream Facial
items.description: A deeply nourishing, intuitively guided facial ritual — the whole-body reset clients return for again and again.

items.title: The Priestess Package
items.description: Our signature pairing of a deep-treatment facial and HydraFacial MD for the most complete skin reset on the menu.

sections.heading: Bodywork, energy & ritual
sections.intro: Care for the nervous system as much as the skin — bodywork, energy healing, and gathering.

items.title: Lymphatic Drainage Massage
items.description: Gentle, rhythmic bodywork that encourages flow, reduces puffiness, and leaves the body feeling lighter.

items.title: Gua Sha & Cupping
items.description: Traditional techniques to release tension, sculpt and de-puff, and restore circulation.

items.title: Reiki Energy Healing
items.description: Hands-on energy work to settle the nervous system, clear stagnation, and restore balance.

items.title: Sound Baths
items.description: Immersive sound sessions that quiet the mind and invite the body into deep rest.

items.title: AmpCoil Frequency Healing
items.description: Targeted frequency and red-light wellness sessions to support the body's own restoration.

items.title: Circles & Readings
items.description: Women's and Sister Circles, tarot and oracle readings, and intuitive sessions for clarity and connection.

sections.heading: Take a little of the ritual home
sections.body: Soul Rituals is also a metaphysical shop — healing crystals, organic Neptune & The Moon skincare, and small treasures chosen to carry the studio's calm into your everyday.
points: Organic, herbal-infused Neptune & The Moon skincare
Gifts and tools for your own home ritual

sections.heading: Book your ritual
sections.body: Call (707) 508-6307 to reserve. Appointments fill quickly on weekends.

sections.heading: Founded on inner magic
sections.subheading: A Sebastopol studio where clean skincare and genuine healing live under one roof — created by esthetician Tiffany Heiden.

sections.heading: Skincare, straight from the heart
body: Soul Rituals began as the vision of esthetician and founder Tiffany Heiden — a place where real skincare and genuine healing belong together. From a little yellow portal of a house on South Main Street, it has grown into one of Sebastopol's most-loved wellness destinations.

The mission has stayed the same since the beginning: center on your inner magic and empower you to feel centered and valued. Every ritual is held with intention — clean organic products and medical-grade results on the skin, crystals, sound, and energy for everything underneath.
Today the studio is a true community space, offering facials, bodywork, and on-site holistic care alongside women's circles, sound baths, and a crystal apothecary.
highlights: Clean, organic Neptune & The Moon skincare
Reiki, sound, and crystals woven into every ritual

items.title: Clean & organic
items.body: Herbal-infused Neptune & The Moon skincare — clean products you can feel good about, with real results.

items.title: Medical-grade results
items.body: HydraFacial MD resurfacing brings clinical-level skincare into a calm, unhurried setting.

items.title: A little Sebastopol gem
items.body: Tucked into a yellow house on South Main Street — intimate, personal, and unmistakably local.

sections.heading: Come find your ritual
sections.body: 496 S Main St, Sebastopol — open Tuesday through Saturday. Call (707) 508-6307 to book.

sections.heading: Book your appointment
sections.blurb: Soul Rituals is at 496 S Main St, Sebastopol, CA 95472, open Tuesday through Saturday, 10am–6pm. Call (707) 508-6307 to book a facial, bodywork, or healing session.
